creator: melifaro@ipfw.ru
text:
gammu doestn't compile on amd64
[100%] Building C object python/gammu/CMakeFiles/python_gammu.dir/src/convertors/wap.o
Linking C shared module _gammu.so
/usr/bin/ld: ../../helper/libstring.a(string.o): relocation R_X86_64_32 can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
./../helper/libstring.a: could not read symbols: Bad value

Fix: Apply patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
